## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 short paragraphs or bullets.

## Why This Change

Explain why this change is needed now.

## Scope Boundary

Call out what is intentionally not included.

## Accessibility Impact

- [ ] No user-facing accessibility impact
- [ ] Accessibility behavior or guidance changed

Details:

## Docs Impact

- [ ] No docs change needed
- [ ] Docs were updated
- [ ] Docs follow-up is needed

## Validation

List the checks you actually ran.

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR stays focused on one concern
- [ ] Rationale is captured above or in a linked issue
- [ ] Accessibility impact is called out, even if none
- [ ] Docs impact is called out, even if none
- [ ] Validation reflects what I actually ran
